property.name: java.library.path

table MAILS if exists Hibernate: drop table ROLES if exists Hibernate: drop table SEASON if exists Hibernate: drop table SPIEL if exists Hibernate: drop table SPIELER if exists Hibernate: drop table USERS if exists Hibernate: create table BUCHUNG (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), datum timestamp, description varchar(255), ITMS timestamp, UTMS timestamp, price numeric(4,2), spiel_id integer, spieler_id integer, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table CONFIG (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), configkey varchar(255) not null, configvalue varchar(1024), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table JOURNAL (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), BUSINESS_CASE varchar(255), description varchar(255), tms timestamp, USERID varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table MAILS (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), attempt integer not null, recipient varchar(255), subject varchar(255), text varchar(4096), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table ROLES (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), description varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table SEASON (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), description varchar(255), enddate date not null, price numeric(19,2), startdate date not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table SPIEL (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), datum date, season_id integer not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table SPIELER (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), activityLevel integer not null, email varchar(255), name varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table USERS (id integer generated by default as identity (start with 1), email varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, regid varchar(255), state varchar(255), userid varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255), group_id integer, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create index datum_idx on BUCHUNG (datum) Hibernate: alter table BUCHUNG add constraint FK16qkjuhkvdr8tcgi3bi288rg7 foreign key (spiel_id) references SPIEL Hibernate: alter table BUCHUNG add constraint FKgknft82c77lqppytisphhyy5m foreign key (spieler_id) references SPIELER Hibernate: alter table CONFIG add constraint UK_n2bgcjmnharfs643rb1gnwvpx unique (configkey) Hibernate: alter table ROLES add constraint UK_1s6p3xpt8owdb603jky0mo815 unique (name) Hibernate: alter table SEASON add constraint start_end_idx unique (startdate, enddate) Hibernate: create index datum_idx on SPIEL (datum) [nate.tool.hbm2ddl.SchemaExport#perform : 483] [HHH000389: Unsuccessful: create index datum_idx on SPIEL (datum) ] [main]
